hero.joinLine: Join James as he runs across Canada for 100 days, 80km/day, to fund scholarships for youth who’ve also been displaced in childhood.

tracker.videoSubtitle: Why I’m running, and who it’s for.
tracker.videoBody: Video message coming in a couple days.
tracker.missionTitle: A scholarship for youth in need
tracker.missionBody: After childhood tragedy, the future can feel uncertain—especially when you’re still dependent on others. A scholarship creates something tangible to aim for: independence, education, and hope.
tracker.gpsBody: The GPS tracker updates continuously as James makes progress each day. At the end of each day the tracker is paused and James will continue his run from there the next morning.

sponsors.title: Partners powering the run
sponsors.subtitle: We’re grateful for every individual and organization that supports this effort, whether through funding, resources, or time. Each contribution plays a critical role in making the mission successful.. Thank you.

map.title: GPS map
map.hint: Scroll to zoom • Drag to pan • Click to drop a pin
map.pinsHelp: Use pins for checkpoints, sponsor spots, or daily highlights.

blog.latestSubtitle: The newest updates from the road

marquee.text: LIVE • TURNING KILOMETERS INTO SCHOLARSHIPS • FOLLOW ALONG • DONATE •

run.title: Run Funders
run.subtitle: Organizations, businesses, and community partners making the run financially possible (travel, gear, food, etc.).

route.title: The Team Behind The Run
route.subtitle: Meet the team behind the run.

support.title: How to support the mission
support.subtitle: Donate, share the mission online, or connect if you want to help by partnering or sponsoring.

donate.title: Donate
donate.body: A simple way to fund and be a part of the charity goal. Every dollar counts!

share.title: Share online
share.bodyPrefix: Sharing daily posts is often more powerful than a one-time donation.

partners.title: Partners wanted
partners.body: Charities, sponsors, and anyone interested in being a part of this mission should reach out!

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Use this form, or email us directly here!
contact.formSubtitle: Please be specific in your message, and if you’re representing an organization, include this too.

errors.missingFields: Please fill out name, email, and message.

contact.success: Message ready to send. (Hook this to Formspree/Netlify Forms or a backend.)

sponsorsCarousel.title: Sponsors
sponsorsCarousel.subtitle: Organizations helping power Project Run Canada.
